caption: The video displays a static presentation slide from a course on "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING." The slide features the title "Heat Exchanger" in bold blue text. Below the title, a bullet point reads, "In order to specify the performance of the heat exchanger in terms of actual heat exchange occurring, a term "$\epsilon$" is defined which is called as Heat Exchanger Effectiveness." The NPTEL logo is visible in the bottom left corner. A footer across the bottom of the slide states, "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay." Throughout the frames, the visual content remains completely stationary, with no changes to the text, logos, or layout, indicating a pause or a still shot of the instructional material.
